# CriticalInfrastructure — A/B OTA parti: # The partition table lives at 0xc000 (the secure-boot bootloader is ~0x9000
# default 0x8000 is too low — see sdkconfig.defaults). Assumes a >= 8 MB flash.
# ota_0 keeps the 0x20000 app offset from the single-slot secure-boot layout
# existing flash procedure still lands the first image correctly. `storage` covers
# 0x200000-0x230000 on purpose: the firmware currently writes persistent state to
# keeps those inside a reserved data region until they move to partition-table
# lookup in OTA Phase 4. Each app slot is 0x1e0000 (~1.9 MB) — the signed app is

leaving generous headroom. Layout is fully contiguous.
